citation: IRC §163(h)(3) + IRS Pub 936 Table 1 — post-2017 MFS half-cap
comment: Hand-calc: filing_status=mfs (Married Filing Separately) -> cap is exactly HALF of the single/MFJ cap. Post-2017: 750000 / 2 = 375000. The half-cap is encoded directly in REF-07 (not divided in code) so future tax-law changes that break the symmetry can be expressed in YAML alone.
